faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.description: Find answers to common questions about Dentagia's dental practice management solutions

items.question: How does the AI-powered scheduling work?
items.answer: Our AI system learns from your practice patterns and automatically optimizes appointment scheduling, fills cancellations, and reduces no-shows by up to 70%.

items.question: Is Dentagia HIPAA compliant?
items.answer: Yes, Dentagia is fully HIPAA compliant with enterprise-grade security, end-to-end encryption, and complete audit trails for all patient data access.

items.question: Can I access my practice data from mobile devices?
items.answer: Yes, Dentagia is fully accessible from desktop, tablet, and mobile devices with our secure cloud-based platform and mobile apps.

items.question: What kind of support do you offer?
items.answer: We provide 24/7 technical support, comprehensive training for your team, and dedicated practice management specialists to help you succeed.

cta.title: Ready to Transform Your Dental Practice?
